subcodes.first_line: Every injury and cruelty sustained in the path of the Most Faithful One is the honey of immortality and a boundless bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر اذيّت و جفا که در سبيل مير وفا وارد شهد بقاست و موهبت عظمی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @chastisement and requital
